query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.tenantId, t.name as tenantName 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel14%'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.tenantId, t.name as tenantName
